queries.query: I have a quick idea — add keyboard shortcuts
queries.rationale: Appendix A seed; explicit raw idea for capture.

queries.query: Customer asked for SSO
queries.rationale: Appendix A seed; unshaped customer request needing backlog entry.

queries.query: We found a bug in the auth flow
queries.rationale: Appendix A seed; bug report captured without analysis.

queries.query: Jot this down before I forget: dark mode toggle in settings
queries.rationale: Informal phrasing — 'jot this down' is the canonical adjacent phrasing named in the spec.

queries.query: Add to the list: CSV export for reports
queries.rationale: Informal phrasing — 'add to the list' maps to recording on the backlog.

queries.query: Stick this on the backlog — users want email digests
queries.rationale: Informal phrasing — colloquial 'stick this on the backlog' is capture intent.

queries.query: New feature request from the CEO: weekly usage summary email
queries.rationale: Capture surface — feature request with no analysis requested.

queries.query: Quick thought — we should probably track failed login attempts
queries.rationale: Informal phrasing — 'quick thought' signals raw capture before refinement.

queries.query: Log this: the onboarding tour breaks on Safari
queries.rationale: Capture surface — 'log this' is adjacent to record-to-backlog.

queries.query: Can you note that we want a dark theme sometime down the line?
queries.rationale: Capture surface — 'note that' plus deferred timing is raw capture.

queries.query: Let me shape this idea
queries.rationale: Near-miss routes to arc-shape (Appendix A); explicit refinement request.

queries.query: What's the backlog status?
queries.rationale: Near-miss routes to arc-status (Appendix A); read-only health query.

queries.query: Refine the SSO idea into a spec-ready brief
queries.rationale: Near-miss routes to arc-shape; explicit brief-building request.

queries.query: Audit the backlog for stale captured ideas
queries.rationale: Near-miss routes to arc-audit; diagnostic sweep, not capture.

queries.query: Show me what's in the backlog right now
queries.rationale: Near-miss routes to arc-status; read-only snapshot, no new idea.

queries.query: Scan the repo for scattered TODOs and bring them into Arc
queries.rationale: Routes to arc-assess; migration sweep, not single-idea capture.

queries.query: Ship the dark-mode feature now that validation passed
queries.rationale: Routes to arc-ship; lifecycle completion, not new entry.

queries.query: Plan the next wave with these four ideas
queries.rationale: Routes to arc-wave; grouping shaped ideas, not capture.

queries.query: Write unit tests for the login service
queries.rationale: Out-of-domain; engineering task unrelated to product-direction capture.

queries.query: Summarize yesterday's standup notes into meeting minutes
queries.rationale: Out-of-domain; note summarization is not backlog capture.
